name: Produccion Software EMI305
postCreateCommand: touch .welcome_flag && uv sync && uv run python -m ipykernel install --user --name produccion-software-emi305 --display-name 'Python (produccion-software-emi305)' && (codeql pack download codeql/python-queries codeql/javascript-queries codeql/java-queries || true) && (grype db update || true) && uv run python scripts/add_submodules.py
